title: PutRequest
description: Request to store a key-value pair in the etcd cluster

key.description: The key to store in base64-encoded format

value.description: The value to store in base64-encoded format

lease.description: Lease ID to associate with the key for TTL-based expiration

prev_kv.description: When true, returns the previous key-value pair before the update

ignore_value.description: When true, updates the key without changing the value (only updates lease)

ignore_lease.description: When true, updates the key without changing the lease
